wikimedia_cc0_word_wav.license: CC0 / public domain dedication as reported by Wikimedia Commons file page
wikimedia_cc0_word_wav.notes: Small real spoken-word WAV fixture. Use for media normalization and ASR smoke when a known transcript is needed.

wikimedia_public_domain_speech_ogg.license: Public Domain Mark 1.0 as reported by Wikimedia Commons file page
wikimedia_public_domain_speech_ogg.notes: Historic real speech OGG fixture. Useful for decode/normalization coverage, not modern ASR WER thresholds.

wikimedia_public_domain_gettysburg_ogg.license: Public domain dedication as reported by Wikimedia Commons file page
wikimedia_public_domain_gettysburg_ogg.notes: Clear long public-domain spoken-word OGG fixture with a published transcript. Use for user-visible folder benchmark proof where one-word or degraded historic audio would be misleading.
wikimedia_public_domain_gettysburg_ogg.expected_text: Four score and seven years ago our fathers brought forth on this continent a new nation, conceived in liberty, and dedicated to the proposition that all men are created equal.

wikimedia_public_domain_spoken_words_web.license: Public domain United States government work as reported by Wikimedia Commons file page
wikimedia_public_domain_spoken_words_web.notes: Small CDC public-domain spoken-word WebM fixture with audio. Use for real video-to-ASR smoke and media normalization coverage.
wikimedia_public_domain_spoken_words_web.expected_text: You are at risk for HIV.

wikimedia_public_domain_roundhay_webm_no.license: Public Domain Mark 1.0 as reported by Wikimedia Commons file page
wikimedia_public_domain_roundhay_webm_no.notes: Small public-domain video-only WebM fixture. Use as a clearer-license no-audio real-video supplement so no-audio behavior is not dependent on SampleFile terms.

samplefile_h264_aac_mp4.license: SampleFile.com public sample fixture; verify current site terms before release use.
samplefile_h264_aac_mp4.notes: Small H.264 + AAC MP4 fixture with audio track.

samplefile_h264_no_audio_mp4.license: SampleFile.com public sample fixture; verify current site terms before release use.
samplefile_h264_no_audio_mp4.notes: Small valid MP4 fixture with no audio track for no-audio failure rows.
